data.body: Anti-pattern scan complete: 1 confirmed candidate (same file, _GHA_ISOLATION_ENABLED line), 2 dismissed (preplanning has fallback guard, playwright-debug/session-init use empty defaults). Fixed _GHA_ISOLATION_ENABLED in same edit batch. Observation: the || echo pattern after read-config is widely used but only harmful when the default is a non-empty meaningful value — empty-string defaults and callers with their own -z guards are safe.
